'''Raglath Nur''' was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He was assigned to [[Denua Ku]]'s [[war party]] responsible for hunting down any ''[[Jeedai]]'' who may have survived the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. What they found instead, however, was [[Irek Ismaren]]. He was killed in the attack on Ismaren.<ref name="Rebel Stand" />
